article.title: Upcoming SDE2 Interviews
article.content:
Hi, I have upcoming SDE2 Interviews at uber and amazon.

I use c++ for LLD mainly. I am not really confident at handling concurrency/multi-threading when it comes to LLD. I have a decent command over OOPS and OOD Principles. How important is it actually? Would I have a chance if I don't implement a solution with the same?
Would it be wise to appear for interviews in this case or should I just withdraw my application considering, if I get rejected I would have to wait for 6 months?

Note: I am a novice, so just looking out for some sincere advice. I am quite confident with regards to my DS Algo skills.

post.content: Just learn about how to implement singleton with locking so that there is only instance, I think that should be enough for that aspect in LLD.
Hey OP,\n\nCan you share your experience with amazon & uber.
hey [@leopsg](https://leetcode.com/leopsg) , can you share your interview experiences.
Read a producer and consumer solution and writing a singleton class. That is enough. Waiting is not best way to go you never know when the hiring stops.\n
